The '''Proliferan Empire''' was the ruling government of the [[Proliferan]] race. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] it was ruled by [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Yentuki]]. They sent some scouts out to discover and evaluate other empires close to them. One such spy was [[Spy 189|Red]] who was evaluating the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] until they found out and imprisoned him for being a spy.
